title: PACCAR, Inc. (PCAR) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: PACCAR, Inc. All lines will be in a listen-only mode until the question-and-answer session.

title: PACCAR (PCAR) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Jump 109% Y/Y
text: PACCAR (PCAR) breezes past Q3 earnings estimates on the back of higher-than-expected pretax income from Trucks, Parts and Financial Services segments.

title: Truck maker Paccar stock rallies more than 2% after profit doubled to a record, beating expectations
text: Shares of Paccar Inc. PCAR, +2.05% rallied 2.3% toward a two-month high in premarket trading Tuesday, after the truck maker reported record third-quarter profit that doubled and revenue that climbed above expectations, as "strong" used truck prices helped provide a boost. Net income rose to $769.4 million, or $2.21 a share, from $380.5 million, or $1.09 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: PACCAR Achieves Record Quarterly Earnings New Truck Models and Record PACCAR Parts Profits Drive Results

title: Paccar: Slightly Undervalued And Well Prepared For An Electric Future
